THEVOID-BLIND_POWER.description: Attacks are [gold]X%[/gold] less accurate, where X is the number of [gold]Blind[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-BLIND_POWER.title: Blind
THEVOID-ON_DEATH_DRAW_POWER.description: On death, draw [gold]X[/gold] cards, where X is the number of [gold]Last Gasp[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-ON_DEATH_DRAW_POWER.title: Last Gasp
THEVOID-ON_DEATH_GAIN_ENERGY_POWER.descr: On death, gain [gold]X[/gold] [gold]Energy[/gold], where X is the number of [gold]Void Pulse[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-ON_DEATH_GAIN_ENERGY_POWER.title: Void Pulse
THEVOID-ON_DEATH_HEAL_POWER.description: On death, heal [gold]X[/gold] HP, where X is the number of [gold]Void Mend[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-ON_DEATH_HEAL_POWER.title: Void Mend
THEVOID-ON_DEATH_APPLY_BLIND_POWER.descr: On death, apply [gold]X Blind[/gold], where X is the number of [gold]Void Flash[/gold] stacks.
THEVOID-ON_DEATH_APPLY_BLIND_POWER.title: Void Flash
